CONTENT.Career: In 2021, Quizera was sent on loan to Portuguese club Académico de Viseu in the Liga Portugal 2, from Borussia Mönchengladbach in the German Bundesliga. On 13 September 2021, he debuted for Académico de Viseu during a 2–2 draw against Farense.On 21 July 2022, Quizera permanently signed for Académico de Viseu in the Liga Portugal 2 for an undisclosed fee.
CONTENT.Honours: IndividualLiga Portugal 2 Midfielder of the Month: February 2023
CONTENT.External links: Famana Quizera at SoccerwayFamana Quizera at WorldFootball.net
CONTENT.International career: Quizera was called up to the Guinea-Bissau national team for a set of 2023 Africa Cup of Nations qualification matches in September 2023.

SUMMARY: Famana Quizera (born 25 April 2002) is a Bissau-Guinean professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder or winger for Liga Portugal 2 club Académico de Viseu and the Guinea-Bissau national team.
